name: Clay Flats
description: A broad, sun-hammered planet of cracked clay basins, shallow river gullies, and low scrubland stretching to every horizon. There are no tall trees — only thorny brush, creek-bed fruit groves, and mud-brick settlements clinging to the banks of slow brown rivers. Folk here are stubborn as pack animals and grow everything they need from the unforgiving dirt.
mood: Hot, slow, and grudging — like a mule that'll get there eventually but won't make it easy. The land doesn't give anything for free.
biome: Cracked clay flats cut by shallow river gullies and thorny scrub lowlands
mechanicalIdentity: Grabs, roots, and attrition — the clay holds you down while threats pile up. Less flashy than other dimensions, more grinding positional punishment.

enemyBatches.name: fodder
enemyBatches.description: Small cheap swarmers, fragile individually but annoying in groups.

enemies.name: Dust Rat
enemies.description: A big mangy rodent the size of a cat with yellowed teeth.

enemies.name: River Snapper
enemies.role: lurks at gully edges, bites and retreats
enemies.description: A mud-colored turtle with a craning neck and hooked beak.

enemies.name: Clay Crawler
enemies.role: slow but sticky, grapples and holds
enemies.description: A fat six-legged grub coated in a crust of dried clay.

enemies.name: Scrub Hound
enemies.role: fast flanker, howls to call others
enemies.description: A lean, mangy dog with patchy brown fur and cracked paws.

enemyBatches.name: standard
enemyBatches.description: Core mid-tier threats with distinct roles.

enemies.name: Gully Raider
enemies.description: A sunburned human bandit in stitched leather, carrying a short blade and a cracked wooden shield.

enemies.name: Mud Slinger
enemies.role: ranged harasser, flings hardened clay balls
enemies.description: A wiry figure in a mud-daubed smock with a leather sling.

enemies.name: Pack Brute
enemies.role: slow heavy hitter, carries a club
enemies.description: A massive, overworked laborer-turned-fighter swinging a thick hardwood cudgel.

enemies.name: Snapper Rider
enemies.role: mounted skirmisher on a giant river snapper
enemies.description: A small bandit crouched atop a huge mud turtle, jabbing with a long pole.

enemies.name: Clay Golem
enemies.description: A man-shaped figure of compressed river clay, sun-baked into rough plates.

enemies.name: Gully Witch
enemies.role: casts mud and rot curses from range
enemies.description: A stooped woman wrapped in cattail reeds, fingers caked in dark silt.

enemies.name: Mule Kicker
enemies.description: A broad-shouldered drover with iron-shod boots and a bad temper.

enemies.name: Dust Husk
enemies.role: fast glass-cannon melee, crumbles on death
enemies.description: A desiccated human corpse animated by dry heat, paper-thin skin stretched over hollow bones.

enemies.name: River Boss
enemies.role: massive armored catfish, slow and nearly unstoppable
enemies.description: A massive armored catfish grown to the size of a boat that surges forward and crushes anything underfoot.

enemies.name: Caravan Captain
enemies.role: tactical commander who buffs nearby raiders
enemies.description: A scarred trader-bandit in layered leather armor, barking orders from the back of a mule.

enemies.name: Big Clay Golem
enemies.role: oversized golem, crushes the ground on landing
enemies.description: A two-story mound of river clay molded roughly into arms and a wide flat head.

enemies.name: Bone Mule
enemies.role: charges in a straight line, devastating knockback
enemies.description: A huge mule skeleton with cracked hooves, dragging lengths of broken harness chain.

items.name: Short Sword
items.description: A plain iron blade, short enough to draw fast in a gully.

items.name: Long Knife
items.description: A heavy belt knife that doubles as a short slashing blade.

items.name: Spear
items.description: A fire-hardened shaft tipped with a flat iron head.

items.name: Sling
items.description: A braided leather strap; hurls clay shot at range.

items.name: Drover Staff
items.description: A thick walking staff used to push pack animals and crack skulls.

items.name: Mattock
items.description: A heavy pick-hoe that hits hard and breaks clay armor.

items.name: Broad Axe
items.description: A wide-bladed chopping axe balanced for big overhead swings.

items.name: Prod Lance
items.description: A long iron-tipped pole; extra reach, good against mounted enemies.

items.name: Plank Shield
items.description: A flat slab of hardwood planks banded with iron strips.

items.name: Clay Shield
items.description: A fired clay disc, heavy but nearly impervious to slashing.

items.name: Tack Bracers
items.description: Studded leather arm wraps; reduce damage from grabs and bites.

items.name: Drover Belt
items.description: A wide belt with iron rings; buffs carry capacity and resists knockback.

items.name: Pawpaw Mash
items.description: A thick sweet paste; restores a moderate amount of health.

items.name: River Mud Jar
items.description: Slap on an ally to harden their skin; grants temporary armor.

items.name: Dust Bomb
items.description: A clay pot of fine grit; blinds enemies in a small area.

items.name: Salted Jerky
items.description: Dense dried meat; fully restores health and removes one debuff.
